## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all`
- [ ] Example or fixture pipeline checked when relevant

## Notes

- Generated image variants, manifests, reports, and helper files are updated together when relevant.
- Secrets and personal data are not included in logs, fixtures, reports, manifests, or screenshots.
